intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.outcome_justification: Using cast birthday discovery, the nearest upcoming birthday date after context date 2026-03-30 is 05-21, and the canonical record 10_entities/cast/tobias.md provides the exact corresponding name.
